---
title: "Essence of Writing — RBG, R.I.P."
description: "On the late Justice Ginsburg's prose."
author: "synesis"
date: "2020-09-19"
categories: [writing, law, links]
image: cover.jpg
---

![Essence of writing — RBG, R.I.P. Image from [Reason](https://reason.com/2020/09/18/rbg-r-i-p/).](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

Essence of writing.

("RBG, R.I.P." <https://lnkd.in/ggByti5>)


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_essence-of-writing-rbg-rip-https-activity-6713195113729916928-JQRd).*
